name: Feishu Skills for OpenClaw
description: OpenClaw Feishu skill package - Enhancement suite for the official Feishu plugin providing intent routing, UX optimization, and capability extension for messaging, cards, and media handling.
review: This skill package provides a highly valuable enhancement to the official Feishu OpenClaw plugin. It excels in delivering a user-friendly experience through intelligent intent routing and UX optimization, significantly simplifying complex interactions for agents. The skill is particularly noteworthy for its comprehensive design guidelines and automated JSON sending, showcasing a deep understanding of Feishu's capabilities. Documentation is exceptional, providing clear guidance at every step. The project demonstrates active maintenance and a strong commitment to code quality, even for the generated outputs. While building upon an existing plugin, its unique approach to user experience and extended capabilities makes it a strong and distinct addition to the catalog.
